col_1: Practical complexity reduction rule: do not piece together engine, gearbox, ECU, and harness from different sources. Use a single complete donor set, then perform only chassis-side adaptation. This is the biggest lever to control time/risk.

Quality gate used to tighten ranges: complete running donor package (engine+matched transmission+ECU/harness/ancillaries), cold-start and hot-idle video, compression test within 10% cylinder spread, no heavy blow-by/smoke, and 30-day startup warranty. Engines not meeting this gate are excluded from this view.
